property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-25 in;C:\windows\Sun\Java in;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Python314\Scripts\;C:\Python314\;C:\windows\system32;C:\windows;C:\windows\System32\Wbem;C:\windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA NvDLISR;C:\Users\Administrator\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Program Files\HP\OMEN-Broadcast\Common;C:\Program Files\Docker\Dockeresources in;C:\ProgramData\chocolatey in;C:\Users\shaym\AppData\Local

testcase.name: shouldBookFlight_whenSeatsAvailable
testcase.system-out: 09:40:28.833 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] Booking 2 seat(s) to Paris for 'Alice', booking TRV-001 09:40:28.836 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] TRV-001 - Flight FL-B5C8 booked: 2 seat(s) to Paris. Remaining: 118
testcase.system-err: Mockito is currently self-attaching to enable the inline-mock-maker. This will no longer work in future releases of the JDK. Please add Mockito as an agent to your build as described in Mockito's documentation: https://javadoc.io/doc/org.mockito/mockito-core/latest/org.mockito/org/mockito/Mockito.html#0.3 WARNING: A Java agent has been loaded dynamically (C:\Users\shaym\.m2\repository\net\bytebuddy\byte-buddy-agent\1.17.8\byte-buddy-agent-1.17.8.jar) WARNING: If a serviceability tool is in use, please run with -XX:+EnableDynamicAgentLoading to hide this warning WARNING: If a serviceability tool is not in use, please run with -Djdk.instrument.traceUsage for more information WARNING: Dynamic loading of agents will be disallowed by default in a future release

testcase.name: shouldCancelFlight_andRestoreSeats
testcase.system-out: 09:40:28.885 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] Booking 5 seat(s) to Tokyo for 'Charlie', booking TRV-004 09:40:28.885 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] TRV-004 - Flight FL-9CFA booked: 5 seat(s) to Tokyo. Remaining: 75 09:40:28.886 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT-COMPENSATE] Cancelling flight for booking TRV-004 09:40:28.886 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT-COMPENSATE] Restored 5 seat(s) to Tokyo

testcase.name: shouldRejectFlight_whenNotEnoughSeats
testcase.system-out: 09:40:28.890 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] Booking 50 seat(s) to Sydney for 'Group', booking TRV-003 09:40:28.890 [main] WARN io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] TRV-003 - No flights available to Sydney. Requested: 50, Available: 40

testcase.name: shouldRejectFlight_whenDestinationUnknown
testcase.system-out: 09:40:28.895 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] Booking 1 seat(s) to Mars for 'Diana', booking TRV-002 09:40:28.895 [main] WARN io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] TRV-002 - No flights available to Mars. Requested: 1, Available: 0

testcase.name: seatsShouldDecrement_afterBooking
testcase.system-out: 09:40:28.899 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] Booking 1 seat(s) to Tokyo for 'Bulk', booking TRV-BULK-0 09:40:28.899 [main] INFO io.orqueio.example.flight.kafka.FlightConsumer -- [FLIGHT] TRV-BULK-0 - Flight FL-84A2 booked: 1 seat(s) to Tokyo.
